
```{=html}
<table class='game-table'>
<colgroup>
<col style='width: 3%;'>
<col style='width: 31%;'>
<col style='width: 15%;'>
<col style='width: 15%;'>
<col style='width: 6%;'>
<col style='width: 15%;'>
<col style='width: 15%;'>
</colgroup>
<thead>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td colspan="5" align="center" class='game-label-crunch'><span data-qmd="$B$"></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td colspan='2' class='game-label-crunch'>Fish 6h</td>
  <td class='game-label'></td>
  <td colspan='2' class='game-label-crunch'>Fish 8h</td>
</tr>
<tr class='td-nb'>
  <td rowspan="2" style="vertical-align: middle;" class='game-label td-nb'><span data-qmd="$A$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-label-crunch'>Fish 6h</td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='center'><span data-qmd="$1, \,$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='left'><span data-qmd="$1$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell'></td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='center'><span data-qmd="$0,$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$1.2$"></span></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td class='game-label-crunch'>Fish 8h</td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='center'><span data-qmd="$1.2, \,$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='left'><span data-qmd="$0$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell'></td>
  <td class='game-cell' align='center'><span data-qmd="$0.4,$"></span></td>
  <td class='game-cell'><span data-qmd="$0.4$"></span></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
```
